name: Clear Hurricane 4" x 7" Pillar Candle Holder - Room Essentials™: Transparent Vase, Tabletop Display
description:
Easily blending with any setting, the Clear Hurricane 4" x 7" Pillar Candle Holder from Room Essentials™ offers a simple design. The transparent glass gives way to candle’s look and the glass construction adds a minimalist touch to any space. This glass holder from Room Essentials™ ensures a trouble-free candlelight experience with its easy maintenance and cleaning, that allows a hassle-free ambiance.

Room Essentials™: Everyday value.
